name: ST AR-15 is your bully…
description:
“Hehehe, you’re bullshitting. It’s small, I know it.”

A pretty big personality twist for AR-15, from being an honorable, loyal soldier to now a brash bully at school. Also this school is a school… with guns, like Blue Archive. Shit’s crazy, and so are my ideas.

Had this idea in mind, now I did it. That’s it. Also the rest of AR Team makes a cameo appearance here lol. Although I have one more idea but then after that, I’m out. So imma ask you guys a favor again and please, give me some good ideas. That’s all, anyways. Enjoy and back to the shadows I go.

(Girls’ Frontline)

Art by: one smoke (Danbooru)
creator: Pausdbutoon
